title: Achtung! Banditi!
writer: Rodolfo Sonego, Ugo Pirro, Giuliani G. De Negri
actors: Gina Lollobrigida, Andrea Checchi, Vittorio Duse
plot: About a group of Italian resistance fighters from Genoa and led by Commander Vento. They must seize a shipment of weapons destined for the German occupation.
